timeline.label: Q1 2026 10-Q: revenue $308.4M (+93% YoY), operating income $61.8M; net liquid ~$1.2B
FY2025 10-K: revenue $852.5M (+115% YoY), operating income $173.4M, OCF $319.3M; Customer A 37% of revenue
FY2024 10-K baseline: revenue $396.3M, operating income $116.1M; rapid hyperscaler adoption phase
Initial public offering on Nasdaq; raises growth capital for AI connectivity product roadmap
Amazon NV Investment Holdings customer warrant issued (1.48M shares at $20.34); strategic hyperscaler alignment
Astera Labs founded; focuses on semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure

industry.structure: AI data-center connectivity is an oligopoly-adjacent niche: Broadcom, Marvell, and Credo compete alongside Astera Labs for PCIe, CXL, and Ethernet retimer/switch sockets with high qualification barriers.
industry.share_shift: Astera Labs gained share as hyperscalers adopted its Aries retimers and Scorpio switches for AI server platforms; FY2025 revenue +115% YoY signals rapid share capture from a small base.
industry.trend: AI infrastructure buildouts create a connectivity bottleneck as GPU clusters scale; PCIe Gen6/CXL and high-speed Ethernet retimers are critical path components, but customer concentration and semi cycles create volatility.
